jd_text: We’re looking for a driven professional to lead and coordinate the implementation of Excellence Criteria in line with DGEP (RADAR System) requirements. This role plays a key part in driving corporate performance, continuous improvement, and excellence culture across RTA. Responsibilities Manage and follow up on Excellence Criteria implementation and DGEP assessments Coordinate corporate performance indicators, workflows, and improvement actions Support annual budget implementation and recommend adjustments Lead excellence self-assessments and train internal assessors Promote excellence awareness and support DGEP awards nominations Provide performance feedback and improvement recommendations to management Participate in cross-functional improvement initiatives and orientation programs Qualifications Must have Bachelors or Master Degree in Business Administration, Industrial Engineering or relevant field Must have 10+ years of experience International Excellence programs and DGEP Must have experience in Strategic Management, Corporate Performance & Project Management Be part of a forward-thinking organization where your expertise shapes performance, innovation, and excellence at scale. Apply now and be part of the excellence journey.
